content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with Auto +1.69%, IT +1.10%, Bank Nifty +0.94%, PSU Bank +1.43% leading. VIX down 2.35% to 17.49 confirms risk-on tone. Multiple Q4 results driving sector momentum (M&M, CAMS, COFORGE, MARICO, SOBHA). Held book is broadly green with PNBHOUSING +7.5% leading.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24300
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1042.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +7.5% with strong fundamentals (Q4 PAT +19%, ICICI Sec target 1350). Current SL 1040.66 already locks in ~5.8% gain. Holding through to original target 1110 (R1 1069 + 1086, then breakout target). Trail-gap from CMP 1057 is ~1.5% — within 1% floor discipline. Marginal SL bump only, ATR support."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down 1.1%, recovering with gold rally (+1.14% today). SL 119 intact, well below entry. Defensive hedge in portfolio. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1715.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.9%, near 52-wk high. Current SL 1715 already locks small gain. Day weakness modest (-0.38%) after strong rally. No-op MODIFY would be wasted — holding SL flat. Actually HOLD is correct here since SL/target unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.5%, banking sector strong +1%. Q4 turnaround thesis intact (PAT +68%, GNPA improved). SL 206 below entry 209, trail too tight given fresh 52w high momentum. Hold to let target 222 play out."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4540.00,
      "new_target": 4875.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.6%, defence momentum strong. Current SL at entry 4575 is too tight given May 14 board meeting binary catalyst within 6 trading days — normal pre-event chop could trigger. Loosening SL slightly to 4540 (-2.4% from CMP, ~0.8% below entry) gives breathing room. Note: per rule 11, this is a held position with binary catalyst within ~6 sessions — borderline but outside 3-session strict zone. Will reassess closer to May 14."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SOBHA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -2.6% post Q4 results. Stock opened strong then faded today. Q4 PAT +125%, FY26 sales +30%, net-cash balance sheet — fundamentals strong. SL 1420 holds (-3.9% from CMP 1438), gives room. Hold for thesis to develop."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +2.1%. Current SL 6950 already at breakeven+. Trail-gap from CMP 7030 is ~1.1% — tight but at the 1% floor. Chemours catalyst in June supports holding to 7400 target. Maintain SL at 6950."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 815.00,
      "new_target": 900.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.1% but stock gapped +9.5% today on Capital Goods sector breakout. Trailing SL up from 800 to 815 (-3.3% from CMP 842) locks in some downside protection while maintaining room for target 900. Trail-gap >1% floor."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "M&M",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 25,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 3290.00,
      "stop_loss": 3210.00,
      "target": 3430.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Q4 record PAT, ROE 20.1%, Tech Mahindra +290bps margin expansion, Auto sector leading +1.69%. April sales +33% YoY for Maruti read-through positive. Entry near LIMIT 3290 (slight pullback from CMP 3301). SL 3210 = -2.4%, target 3430 = +4.3%, R:R 1.75. Position size: 25 × 3290 = INR 82,250 (~8.2% of portfolio). Risk = 8.2% × 2.4% = 0.20% of portfolio — well within 0.5% budget. Auto cluster check: no other Auto holdings, single-name exposure clean."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 60,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 820.00,
      "stop_loss": 800.00,
      "target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT +18%, India volume +9% (best in cohort), international +19% CC. Breakout above 52w high 813.50 today, FMCG defensive with rural recovery. Entry LIMIT 820 (below CMP 821.30, opened 826). SL 800 = -2.4%, target 855 = +4.3%, R:R 1.75. Position: 60 × 820 = INR 49,200 (~4.9% of portfolio). Risk = 4.9% × 2.4% = 0.12% portfolio — well within budget. Defensive FMCG diversifier vs current cyclical-heavy book."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1042.00,
      "reasoning": "Marginal trail to lock in ~5.9% gain; respects 1% trail-gap from CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge, SL 119 intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1715 already locks small gain; let target 1820 play out at 52w high momentum."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Banking strong, Q4 turnaround thesis intact, SL 206 valid."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 4540.00,
      "reasoning": "Loosen SL slightly from entry 4575 to give pre-results breathing room before May 14 board meeting; trail-gap from CMP 4650 is 2.4%."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SOBHA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 fundamentals strong; SL 1420 gives 1.3% buffer below CMP; hold for thesis."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 6950 already at breakeven+; Chemours June catalyst supports patience."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 815.00,
      "reasoning": "Capital Goods breakout +9.5%; raise SL from 800 to 815 to protect against giveback while holding to 900 target."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "CAMS (post Q4 +8.7%, MF infra monopoly) interesting but post-gap entries need pullback — watch for retest of 770 zone. COFORGE bearish per research (NPM compression, dividend deferred) — avoid. AUROPHARMA near 52w high but earnings May 30 — not a fresh entry now. BIOCON earnings May 7 — binary event tomorrow, NO entry. VEDL post-demerger price discovery still messy — sit out. CAMS, HFCL, ABCAPITAL on watch for pullback entries.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Portfolio at 43% deployed before new entries. Adding M&M (~8.2%) + MARICO (~4.9%) brings deployed to ~56% — still well below 80% soft target with room for more if setups emerge. Sector spread: Financial Services (PNBHOUSING+BANDHANBNK), Services (ADANIPORTS), Capital Goods (HAL+TITAGARH), Realty (SOBHA), Chemicals (NAVINFLUOR), Auto (M&M new), FMCG (MARICO new), ETF (GOLDBEES). Capital Goods cluster at ~7% (HAL+TITAGARH) — within limits. HAL has board meeting May 14 (8 sessions) — outside strict 3-session window but flagged for re-evaluation closer to date. No same-cluster stacking violations."
}
